generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values order and duty, I've been thinking about how strategic autonomy really strengthens our national security. My neighbor, who's in the reserves, mentioned how reliable domestic supply chains would make a huge difference in crisis preparedness. It's not just about being self-sufficient—it's about ensuring our allies can count on us when it matters most. #NationalSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
